# shelley

Manage Shelley agent on VMs

## Usage

```
shelley <subcommand> [args...]
```

## Subcommands

### shelley install

Install or upgrade Shelley to the current version

**Usage:**
```
shelley install <vm>
```

### shelley prompt

Send a prompt to Shelley on a VM

**Usage:**
```
shelley prompt <vm> <prompt>
```
